Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Off Calendar

Petiiton For Authorization To Administer Estate Under The Independent Administration Of Estates Act
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser for and with (administrator) Tina Brown. Paula Rose, Broker.

The court questioned why a report of sale had not been filed, and why Ms. Brown signed a contract with no power being authorized. Mr. Glasser stated that the sale will not go through without Ms. Brown being appointed and that the property is in bad shape. The court expressed concern that there are no allegations of the property being listed and marketed and that authority is being requested after the fact. Ms. Rose explained that the property was part of a crime scene, there is pending three year litigation against the development, buyers are unable to get financing and that they have an all cash offer. Ms. Rose also reported that there was an MLS listing and a thirty day marketing, that the property is part of the City's affordable housing, that the City has first right of refusal and that the City never gives up their control. Mr. Glasser is to file a declaration regarding efforts of marketing, the City's involvement and the facts of the crime scene. The petition for authorization to administer estate was taken under submission pending receipt of said declaration.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
